app.name: Dub Studio
app.tagline: Dub & translate any short video — locally.

drop.title: Drop a video to dub
drop.hint: MP4 or MOV — everything runs on your machine

hero.headline: Dub any short video like it was made that way.
hero.sub: Auto-analysis runs the first pass — then you take over: voices, text, caption style, blur, with a live preview at every step.
hero.formats: MP4 · MOV · up to 4K · nothing leaves your machine

analyze.title: Analyzing your video
analyze.firstRunNote: First run: models download once (several GB) — fast after that

mode.funny_desc: Gemma rewrites the script, then re-dubs

remix.title: Remix
remix.placeholder: Theme — e.g. ‘pirate theme’, ‘as a news report’, ‘sarcastic’
remix.hint: Gemma rewrites the whole script on your theme, keeping the timing. Export then re-dubs it.

seg.refreshHint: Force-refresh the preview / subtitles (if it lags or hangs)

help.title: About Dub Studio
help.intro: Dub Studio dubs and translates any short video entirely on your machine — nothing leaves your computer. Drop a clip; it auto-analyzes once, then you fine-tune every detail with a live preview.
how: Drop an MP4/MOV — it splits the audio, recognizes speech, tells speakers apart, translates, and reads on-screen text.
Pick a mode: subtitles, a full dub, or a funny remix.
Edit anything — transcript, voices, subtitle style, masks — with instant preview.
Export the finished video. Everything runs locally on your GPU.
features: Voice cloning, auto-cast per speaker, or a voice pack
Rewrite the script and re-dub (funny mode)
Subtitle styling: font, color, outline, shadow, plate
Mask covers: blur or a solid rectangle over the original
sections: Transcript — edit each line and its translation
Voice — pick how it's voiced and regenerate
Settings (⚙) — the model stack (ASR / LLM / Vision / TTS)
help.donateIntro: I build local AI tools for free — no cloud, no subscriptions. Donations help me keep improving them and shipping new ones. Thank you! 🙏
